title: stelis marginata
intro: Stelis marginata, also known as the Orchid of the Forest, is a type of orchid species found in tropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis marginata include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Stelis marginata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
